top_level_envelope.answer: Method execution envelope when top-level status is success
top_level_envelope.error_text: Human-readable error message when status is error
top_level_envelope.error_code: Numeric error code when status is error

method_envelope.result: Method-specific payload when method status is success
method_envelope.errors: List of method-level errors when method status is error

request_error_codes.meaning: Authentication failed or required login/passwd parameters are invalid.
The API request is malformed or uses invalid top-level request parameters.
The requested API method does not exist.

method_error_codes.meaning: Validation failed for method input data.
A limit was reached, including account limits or the documented API limit of no more than 60 requests per minute per user.
Internal error while executing the method.

notes: Wrapper code must check both the top-level response status and the nested method status in answer.
Wrapper exceptions should expose raw error_code/error_text for top-level failures and raw errors for method-level failures.
